case_title: SCOTT WENTZ ET AL VS. INNOVATIVE COMBUSTION TECHNOLOGIES INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED SEP-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE COMBUSTION TECHNOLOGIES INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE COMBUSTION TECHNOLOGIES INC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE COMBUSTION TECHNOLOGIES INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,690.00 FILED BY WENTZ, SCOTT YEE, RAINA AS TO DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE COMBUSTION TECHNOLOGIES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTONIO DE LAO SORIANO, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTAGE SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE COMBUSTION TECHNOLOGIES INC $3,690.00 PRINCIPAL, $377.00 INTEREST, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,192.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2160.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. THE PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO NAME MONTAGE SERVICES, INC. AS THE SOLE PLAINTIFF, DELETING SCOTT WENTZ AND RAINA YEE AS NAMED PLAINTIFFS, WAIVING FORMAL AMENDMENT AND SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE DISMISSED AS TO SCOTT WENTZ AND RAINA YEE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-30-2017 AT 3:30 PM.
